lines.label: Land — comp-based fair value vs GAAP historical cost
lines.source: FY2025 10-K land at historical cost (filing anchor only); fair land from CPRT/_scripts/roll_up_land_marks.py base case (~17,100 owned ac × ~$405K/ac from transaction sample). GAAP cost is not a mark input.

notes: Lawrence FCF remains primary stance gate; this is a parallel book/NAV cross-check per current_book_estimate.md.
Low/base/high fair land: see fair_land_summary.json network_fair_land_m.
Pilot yard marks cover 7 of 20 yards; network extrapolation uses disclosed ~19,000 ac × ~90% owned.
